name: Mexican Rice:
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Chopped green peppers, cut into strips (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream, chili powder, and salt in a bowl.
2. In a 13 x 9-inch baking pan, layer half of the cooked rice, half of the sour cream-chili mixture, and half of the shredded cheese strips.
3. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
4. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees F.) for 25 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and top with meatballs and sauce.
6. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes or until cheese melts.
